response.justification: Bogdan Szabo brings a broad polyglot background spanning 15+ years and currently holds a Staff Software Engineer title at Google, which signals genuine technical caliber. However, the resume contains no demonstrable experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging, telemetry infrastructure, statistical analysis, or growth measurement systems — which are the explicit core competencies this Principal IC6 role is built around. The candidate's work centers on product feature development, GIS platforms, and direct mail automation; there is no evidence of the rollout-risk management, experiment bias detection, or cross-team measurement platform ownership the job description demands.
strengths: Current Staff SWE at Google with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling contributions, signaling technical seniority
Demonstrated high-scale distributed systems experience handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Dunnhumby
Broad polyglot proficiency (TypeScript, C/C++, Java, DLang, Node.js) covering several required languages
concerns: Zero experimentation platform, A/B testing, or feature-flagging experience visible anywhere in the resume
No telemetry infrastructure, metrics pipeline, or statistical/data analysis work mentioned across the entire career history
Profile is that of a generalist product engineer and open-source builder, not a growth systems architect operating at Principal scope

key_factors.factor: Staff SWE at Google with AI tooling work
